testcase.name: test_login_admin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration10_mollie.py:218: in test_login_admin assert "user" in r.json() E AssertionError: assert 'user' in {'created_at': '2026-04-20T08:53:24.343136+00:00', 'email': 'admin@conceptfactory.fr', 'id': '69e5e9842446df29e5036516', 'name': 'Admin', ...} E + where {'created_at': '2026-04-20T08:53:24.343136+00:00', 'email': 'admin@conceptfactory.fr', 'id': '69e5e9842446df29e5036516', 'name': 'Admin', ...} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json
